title: Update skills: add update-skia, sync skill-creator from upstream
body:
## Summary

Two skill updates:

### 1. New `update-skia` skill
10-phase workflow for updating SkiaSharp's Skia dependency to a new Chrome milestone. Includes:
- Breaking changes checklist template
- C API impact analysis steps  
- Version file update procedures
- Build and test verification steps
- Lessons learned from m119→m121 update (8 known gotchas)
- Detailed merge/PR checklists adopted from `native-dependency-update` skill

### 2. `skill-creator` sync from upstream
Synced with [anthropics/skills@b0cbd3d](https://github.com/anthropics/skills/tree/b0cbd3df1533b396d281a6886d5132f623393a9c/skills/skill-creator):
- **SKILL.md**: Add guidance for updating existing skills (preserve name, copy to writeable location)
- **improve_description.py**: Migrate from `claude -p` subprocess to `anthropic` SDK with extended thinking
- **run_loop.py**: Pass `anthropic` client to improvement functions
